title: mousestate

messages.description: click status: 1 <button is pressed>, 0 <button is released>
delta 'x' (position difference in pixels) from last poll
delta 'y' (position difference in pixels) from last poll

methods.description: poll position data automatically when mouse cursor moves
does not poll position data (only via bang)
sets mode, which defines the coordinate (0, 0) point in relation to (0: screen, 1: patch window, 2: front most window)
sets current position to (0, 0) of Pd's coordinate system

body: [mousestate] reports click status, cursor position coordinates and cursor delta. The click report is always given (and sampled every 50 ms), the rest needs to be polled.
